calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Ownership Of Property
Off Calendar May-27-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Diamond appeared by zoom for Ricardo Lopez (Petitioner/Trustee).

The Court stated that it is not quite sure why Counsel is arguing about the validity of the disclaimers, that when the spousal property order was issued in 2011 the Court had the disclaimers before it, that the order confirmed Marta's one-half interest of the property as community property interests and that it will not touch that Court order. The Court also noted that the final distribution order in Pedro's will distributes his one-half interest, that everything is accounted for, that what is left outstanding are the one-half interests of Marta and that it is clear to the Court that Marta intended her interests to be in the trust. The Petition for Order Determining Ownership of Property is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
